title: CKA Lab Task
description: Schema for CKA exam prep platform task definitions

id.description: Unique task identifier in domain-number format

domain.description: CKA exam domain this task belongs to

title.description: Short descriptive title of the task

description.description: Detailed multiline markdown description of the task requirements

time_estimate.description: Estimated time to complete the task

hints.description: Progressive hints from gentle nudge to near-solution (exactly 3)

exam_tips.description: Tips specific to the CKA exam format and strategy

setup_script.description: Filename of the setup script in the setup/ directory

verify_script.description: Filename of the verification script in the setup/ directory

verify_command.description: kubectl command to run for automated verification

verify_expected.description: Expected output from verify_command (checked as substring match)

solution_files.description: Paths to solution files relative to the domain directory

prerequisites.description: Task IDs that must be completed before this task
